prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, let's do this! I know you've been putting off this task all morning, but you've got this! It's natural to procrastinate when something seems difficult, but trust me, the satisfaction you'll feel after completing it will be well worth it. Just remember why this task is important to you and how much better you'll feel once it's off your plate.

First, take a deep breath and clear your mind. Break down the task into smaller, manageable steps. Focus on the first step only, and don't worry about the rest yet. You can do this one step at a time. And if you need to, reward yourself after each step with a short break or something you enjoy.

Remember: Rome wasn't built in a day. You've got time, and you're capable of achieving great things. It's time to channel your inner Productivity Pro and show this task who's boss! You've got this, champ! Now, go get 'em!
